description: Comprehensive introduction to machine learning, data mining, and statistical pattern recognition.
Study of microprocessor architecture, assembly language programming, and interfacing techniques.
Modern software development life cycles, requirement analysis, and agile methodologies.
Master the foundations of Deep Learning, understand how to build neural networks, and learn how to lead successful machine learning projects.
Fundamental principles of mechanical design, stress analysis, and failure theories for common machine elements like shafts, gears, and bearings.
